scheme.title: Climate Data Hub Resource Type Vocabulary
scheme.description: Controlled vocabulary of broad resource kinds used to describe the primary thing a CDH record is about. These values describe the record-level resource, not individual asset formats. CDH author-facing ids are mapped to COAR Resource Type concepts.

concepts.label: Dataset
concepts.description: Structured data, observations, model outputs, geospatial layers, tables, or other data products.

concepts.label: Software
concepts.description: A tool, software, service, dashboard, workflow, model interface, or other usable computational resource.

concepts.label: AI skill
concepts.description: Reusable AI-agent skill, prompt package, workflow capability, or assistant extension intended to perform a defined task.

concepts.label: Document
concepts.description: Written resource such as a report, brief, paper, guidance note, manual, documentation, or other text-based output.
